subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, capped with a ridge of snow, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp glows warm against the snowfall, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex flecked with settling snowflakes, colors cool and soft; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood dusted with a thin layer of settling snow
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A quiet Scandinavian residential street intersection under an overcast winter day with falling snow. The snow-packed road is white and firm, its painted stop line barely showing through a dusting of snow, flanked by snow-laden trees and pale timber houses. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Flat white light leaves no shadows, and the lit red lamp glows warm against the cold snowfall.

lighting.conditions: Overcast winter day with dim falling snow
lighting.direction: Flat directionless white light through snow cloud
lighting.shadows: No cast shadows; snow and cloud scatter light evenly, only faint grounding beneath the post
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat cold white light under which the illuminated red lamp glows warmly and snow-flecked balloons read as soft accents

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the snow-packed road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the warm red lamp amid drifting snow
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cold high-key palette of white snow, pale grey sky, muted timber tones, with the warm red lamp and snow-dusted balloons as color accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Still, hushed, wintry, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons in the snow
aesthetics.patterns: Snow-softened lane markings, drifting snowflakes, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, warm red lamp, and overlapping snow-flecked green balloon amid falling snow

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the snow-packed residential street under overcast winter light, approaching the intersection where the red light glows warm through the snowfall and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the snow-dusted stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the snow-flecked balloons continue to sway in the cold breeze.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the snowy residential intersection under overcast winter light; the single traffic light displays a steady warm red amid falling snow, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent against the snow.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the snow-dusted stop line on the packed snow road; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping snow-flecked balloon is clearly framed against white surroundings.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; snow-flecked balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons and drifting snow move.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a snow-packed Scandinavian residential street under overcast winter light with snow falling, toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady warm red, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the cold breeze. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the snow-dusted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the snow-flecked balloons still gently bobbing under flat white light.
audio_description: Ambient snowy-street sounds: snow-muffled quiet, faint wind, a distant muted car, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Muffled rustle of snow-dusted balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
